title: Azure Service Bus plugin for EDA
description: An ansible-rulebook event source module for receiving events from an Azure service bus

feedback.description: Should the source plugin wait for feedback before processing the next event from the Azure Service Bus.
feedback.title: Feedback

feedback_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds to wait for feedback from the rule engine before raising an exception. Only applies when feedback is enabled.
feedback_timeout.title: Feedback Timeout
